name: plugin-average-score
module_doc_summary: Average-score analytics plugin with synthetic cohort benchmark families.
mapper_doc_summary: Emit per-student sum/count records from comma-separated score lines.
reducer_doc_summary: Return a rounded average score for one student key.
combiner_doc_summary: Merge shard-local sum/count objects before the final reduce step.
benchmark_generator_doc_summary: Generate deterministic cohort score fixtures for benchmark scenarios.
benchmark_note_hook_doc_summary: Describe the intended hot keys for each synthetic benchmark family.

name: plugin-max-score
module_doc_summary: Maximum-score reducer plugin for simple leaderboard-style demos.
mapper_doc_summary: Parse comma-separated score rows into integer leaderboard updates.
reducer_doc_summary: Return the overall maximum score for one student key.
combiner_doc_summary: Keep the shard-local maximum score for one student key.
